description: Collects VB custom property overrides from a scope and emits them as a theme.css block (or JSON). The assembly glue for the Theme Composer.

attributes.name: scope
attributes.description: CSS selector for the scope to read overrides from.

attributes.name: selector
attributes.description: Selector written in the emitted CSS output.

attributes.name: include
attributes.description: Comma-separated prefixes to collect. Default covers all VB token categories.

attributes.name: format
attributes.description: Output format. 'dtcg' emits Design Tokens Community Group JSON (stable spec 2025.10).

attributes.name: vb-version
attributes.description: Optional VB version string included in DTCG $extensions metadata.

attributes.name: live
attributes.description: Re-scan whenever an editable specimen fires a :change event.
